CONTENT.Career statistics: As of 22 June 2024Scores and results list the Czech Republic's goal tally first.
CONTENT.International career: In 2016, Kopic scored his first goal for the Czech senior squad in a friendly match against Armenia, ending in a 3–0 victory for the Czechs.

SUMMARY: Jan Kopic (born 4 June 1990) is a Czech professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Viktoria Plzeň in the Czech First League. He has represented the Czech Republic at under-21 level. Kopic is the younger brother of Czech footballer Milan Kopic.
